name: Kit - STAR Replika
description:
Hardass Replika ready to kiss down Eules into submission.

A mix of a card from Technetium (Janitor), a lorebook from Meep (Chub), another lorebook from Auroth (Chub) and me :)

Intros

1- Patrolling the hospital floors

2- Once again a perfect score at the shooting range

3- Aftermath of beating a Gestalt after insulting one of the cute Eules' drawings

4- A Storch did some heinous acts and now the Gestalts are quiet, it's boring when no one defies anything
creator: lebigboss420
